executives.name: Jay Layman
executives.background: Mr. Layman was formerly the President and COO of Seabridge Gold. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Jinhee Magie
executives.background: Ms. Magie is the CFO and Senior Vice President of Lundin Mining Corporation.
